name: TRIzol RNA Extraction

components.name: 1. 加 TRIzol 裂解
components.note: 1 mL per 5–10×10⁶ cells; 组织: 1 mL per 50–100 mg, 匀浆器研磨

components.name: 2. 室温静置 5 min
components.note: 充分裂解核蛋白复合物

components.name: 3. 加 0.2 mL 氯仿 (per 1 mL TRIzol)
components.note: 盖紧, 剧烈摇晃 15 s, 室温 2–3 min

components.name: 4. 离心 12,000×g, 15 min, 4°C
components.note: 分三层: 上层水相 (RNA) / 中间层 (DNA) / 下层有机相 (蛋白)

components.name: 5. 小心吸取上层水相至新管
6. 加 0.5 mL 异丙醇 (per 1 mL TRIzol)
7. 离心 12,000×g, 10 min, 4°C
components.note: RNA 沉淀为白色/透明胶状颗粒

components.name: 8. 弃上清, 加 1 mL 75% 乙醇洗涤
10. 弃乙醇, 风干 5–10 min
components.note: 勿过度干燥 (沉淀变透明即可), 否则难溶解

components.name: 11. 加 20–50 µL RNase-free H₂O 溶解
components.note: 55°C 孵育 10 min 助溶解; 轻弹混匀

notes.en: All steps use RNase-free consumables. TRIzol is toxic (phenol + guanidinium) — work in fume hood with gloves. Typical yield: 5–15 µg RNA per 10⁶ cells. For small amounts, add 1 µL glycogen (20 mg/mL) as carrier before isopropanol step. Store RNA at -80°C. DNase I treatment recommended before RT-qPCR.
notes.zh: 全程使用无 RNase 耗材。TRIzol 含苯酚和异硫氰酸胍，通风橱操作，戴手套。典型产量：每 10⁶ 细胞 5–15 µg RNA。微量样品在异丙醇沉淀前加 1 µL glycogen (20 mg/mL) 做载体。RNA 保存 -80°C。RT-qPCR 前建议 DNase I 处理。

ref: Chomczynski & Sacchi (1987) Anal Biochem 162:156–159; Rio et al. (2010) CSH Protoc doi:10.1101/pdb.prot5439; Thermo Fisher TRIzol Reagent User Guide (Pub. No. MAN0001271)

usage.en: Extract total RNA from cells or tissues using TRIzol (guanidinium thiocyanate-phenol-chloroform) method.
usage.zh: TRIzol 法（异硫氰酸胍-苯酚-氯仿）从细胞或组织中提取总 RNA。

briefSteps.en: Lyse cells in TRIzol → add chloroform → centrifuge → collect aqueous phase → precipitate RNA with isopropanol → wash with 75% EtOH → air dry → dissolve in RNase-free water → quantify by NanoDrop.
briefSteps.zh: TRIzol 裂解细胞 → 加氯仿 → 离心 → 收集水相 → 异丙醇沉淀 RNA → 75% 乙醇洗涤 → 风干 → RNase-free 水溶解 → NanoDrop 定量。

detailedSteps.en: Add 1 mL TRIzol per 5–10×10⁶ cells (or per 50–100 mg tissue); homogenize tissue with a rotor-stator homogenizer. Pipette repeatedly to ensure complete lysis.
detailedSteps.zh: 每 5–10×10⁶ 细胞（或每 50–100 mg 组织）加入 1 mL TRIzol；组织使用匀浆器研磨。反复吹打确保充分裂解。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at room temperature for 5 min to allow complete dissociation of nucleoprotein complexes.
detailedSteps.zh: 室温静置 5 min，使核蛋白复合物充分解离。

detailedSteps.en: Add 0.2 mL chloroform per 1 mL TRIzol. Cap tube tightly and shake vigorously for 15 seconds, then incubate at room temperature for 2–3 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 每 1 mL TRIzol 加入 0.2 mL 氯仿。拧紧管盖，剧烈振荡 15 秒，室温静置 2–3 min。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 12,000×g for 15 min at 4°C. Three phases form: upper aqueous (RNA), white interphase (DNA/protein), lower red organic phase (protein/lipid).
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C、12,000×g 离心 15 min。形成三层：上层水相（RNA）、白色中间层（DNA/蛋白）、下层红色有机相（蛋白/脂质）。

detailedSteps.en: Carefully transfer only the upper aqueous phase (~60% of TRIzol volume) to a fresh RNase-free tube, avoiding the white interphase.
detailedSteps.zh: 小心吸取上层水相（约为 TRIzol 用量的 60%）至新的无 RNase 管，勿碰白色中间层。

detailedSteps.en: Add 0.5 mL isopropanol per 1 mL TRIzol used. Mix by inversion 10 times and incubate at room temperature for 10 min. For low-abundance samples, add 1 µL glycogen (20 mg/mL) as co-precipitant.
detailedSteps.zh: 每 1 mL TRIzol 加入 0.5 mL 异丙醇，颠倒混匀 10 次，室温静置 10 min。微量样品可加 1 µL glycogen（20 mg/mL）作为共沉淀剂。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 12,000×g for 10 min at 4°C. RNA pellet appears as a white or translucent gel-like pellet at the bottom/side of the tube.
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C、12,000×g 离心 10 min。RNA 沉淀呈白色或半透明胶状颗粒附着于管底或管壁。

detailedSteps.en: Discard supernatant completely. Add 1 mL of 75% ethanol (prepared with DEPC-treated water) per 1 mL TRIzol. Vortex briefly to resuspend pellet.
detailedSteps.zh: 彻底弃去上清。每 1 mL TRIzol 加入 1 mL 75% 乙醇（用 DEPC 水配制）。短暂涡旋重悬沉淀。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 7,500×g for 5 min at 4°C. Carefully remove all ethanol with a pipette; brief air-dry pellet for 5–10 min at room temperature until it turns translucent (do not over-dry).
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C、7,500×g 离心 5 min。用移液器彻底吸去乙醇；室温风干沉淀 5–10 min 至透明（勿过度干燥）。

detailedSteps.en: Dissolve RNA pellet in 20–50 µL RNase-free water. Incubate at 55°C for 10 min with occasional flicking to aid dissolution.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 RNA 沉淀溶于 20–50 µL 无 RNase 水中。55°C 孵育 10 min，间歇轻弹管底助溶。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify by NanoDrop (A260/280 ≈ 2.0; A260/230 > 1.8) and verify integrity by agarose gel (28S:18S ratio ≈ 2:1). Store at −80°C.

note.en: RNA pellet washed with 75% EtOH can be stored at −70°C for up to 1 week before proceeding to dissolution.
note.zh: 75% 乙醇洗涤后的 RNA 沉淀可在 −70°C 保存最多 1 周，之后再进行溶解步骤。

note.en: Dissolved RNA can be stored at −80°C for up to 12 months. Aliquot to avoid freeze-thaw cycles.
note.zh: 溶解后的 RNA 可在 −80°C 保存最多 12 个月。建议分装以避免反复冻融。
